Alerts_Strikes.usage: Red badges for strikes, reminders, critical alerts

typography.mono_usage: RPM values, financial stats, code/ID snippets
rules: Overlines and small labels must be uppercase with tracking-[0.2em].
Use font-black for key numbers, font-light for elegant descriptions.

layouts.global: Mobile-first responsive, Left sidebar + Main content area.
layouts.sidebar: Fixed, w-64 on desktop, collapsible on mobile. Real-time dynamic updates.
layouts.dashboard_grid: Bento Grid high density. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. gap-4 or gap-6.
layouts.landing_page: Tetris Grid. Wide spacing (gap-12, py-24). Asymmetric arrangements.

surfaces_and_components.cards: Flat solid background (#121212), 1px subtle border, sharp or max rounded-md. Hover: border color shifts to role's accent color.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Pill-shaped for Landing CTA. Sharp rounded-md for Dashboard actions. Must have hover states increasing brightness.
surfaces_and_components.glassmorphism: Use sparingly for sticky headers or modals. bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl and border-white/10.
surfaces_and_components.chat_interface: Embedded widget or side-drawer, real-time message bubbles with role-based accent borders.
surfaces_and_components.badges: Pill shape, intense glowing border or solid background for strikes (bg-[#FF2A2A] text-white).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must shift background or border color.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform). NO 'transition-all'.
motion_and_interactions.real_time_updates: Animate data changes with soft flash/glow using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for dashboard widgets (Framer Motion).

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format based on role (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet APCA standards. Provide text-shadow for text over images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use .jsx or .js files for React components. Do NOT use .tsx files.
Implement Shadcn UI components customized for this dark, neon-accented aesthetic.
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned).
Do NOT use 'transition: all' globally. Use specific transition utilities like transition-colors, transition-opacity.
Never use generic AI emojis for icons; strictly use standard SVG icons like lucide-react.
Implement the landing page with custom HTML/Tailwind, and Dashboard with customized Shadcn components.
Ensure the sidebar dynamically shows active campaigns and unread chat indicators. It must be updated dynamically.
For the real-time chat, build a sleek sidebar/drawer or in-page chat with distinct user message colors based on role.
Make sure all grid items are direct children of the grid container.
Do NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for elements with content beneath them. Use backdrop blur and slight opacity (e.g., bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md).
Ensure the layout is responsive (mobile-first), with collapsible sidebar on smaller screens.
Implement red pastilles/badges for strikes and reminders as critical alerts.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.js or similar.
